name: Nicotinamide riboside older Veterans muscle registry
summary: Active-not-recruiting registry testing nicotinamide riboside effects on functional capacity and muscle physiology in older Veterans, with no posted results.
population: Older Veterans with muscle physiology and functional-capacity endpoints

trial_details.expected_results_window: Primary completion is listed as actual Mar. 31, 2026 and study completion as estimated Jun. 30, 2026; no posted results were present in the Jun. 8, 2026 API view.
trial_details.horizon_note: This is near-term NR functional-capacity and muscle-physiology watchlist context.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results could clarify whether NAD or redox-restoration programs translate biomarker target engagement into prespecified function, physiology, safety, or disease-boundary outcomes.
